2606.03927.title: FFR: Forward-Forward Learning for Regression
2606.03927.paper_summary: The Forward-Forward (FF) algorithm offers a computationally efficient and biologically plausible alternative to backpropagation (BP) by training neural networks through purely local, layer-wise optimization. However, FF is inherently designed for classification via contrastive positive-negative sample pairs, and extending it to regression poses fundamental challenges: continuous target space lack natural "opposites" for contrastive learning, and the standard goodness function carries no information about target magnitude or ordering. We propose FFR (Forward-Forward for Regression), to our knowledge, the first framework to extend FF to real-world regression and demonstrate competitive performance across diverse real-world datasets. FFR introduces three key innovations: (1) an ordinal competitive goodness function that replaces contrastive pairs with competitive learning between partitioned neuron groups under distance-aware ordinal supervision; (2) a stratified ladder architecture where shallow layers learn coarse ordinal discrimination and deeper layers refine into fine-grained regression, with multi-scale feature aggregation for inter-layer collaboration; and (3) hierarchical prediction with uncertainty estimation, where multi-scale predictors jointly provide robust predictions and prediction confidence as a free-lunch. Extensive experimental results show FFR recovers on average 98.6% of BP's accuracy across five real-world regression benchmarks while reducing peak training memory to only 27% of BP's at depth 8 and 8% at depth 32, with per-iteration time around 72% of BP's, and substantially outperforms all BP-free competitors.
2606.03927.paper_summary_zh: 前向前向（FF）算法提供了一種計算上高效且生物上合理的替代方案，以通過純粹的局部、層級優化來訓練神經網絡，取代反向傳播（BP）。然而，FF 本質上是為通過對比正負樣本對進行分類而設計的，將其擴展到回歸面臨根本性的挑戰：連續目標空間缺乏自然的「對立面」以進行對比學習，標準的優度函數不包含有關目標大小或排序的信息。我們提出 FFR（回歸的前向前向），據我們所知，這是第一個將 FF 擴展到現實世界回歸的框架，並在各種現實世界數據集上展示了具有競爭力的性能。FFR 引入了三個關鍵創新：（1）一種序數競爭優度函數，通過在距離感知的序數監督下，替換對比樣本對為分區神經元組之間的競爭學習；（2）一種分層梯子架構，其中淺層學習粗略的序數區分，深層則精煉為細粒度回歸，並進行多尺度特徵聚合以促進層間協作；（3）具有不確定性估計的分層預測，其中多尺度預測器共同提供穩健的預測和作為免費午餐的預測信心。大量實驗結果顯示，FFR 在五個現實世界回歸基準上平均恢復了 98.6% 的 BP 準確性，同時將峰值訓練記憶減少到 BP 在深度 8 時的 27% 和深度 32 時的 8%，每次迭代時間約為 BP 的 72%，並且顯著超越所有不使用 BP 的競爭者。
2606.03927.author: Xinyang Liu et.al.
2606.03927.authors: Xinyang Liu, Xuanyu Liang, Shiqi Ding, Boyang Li, Zhiqiang Que, Jiayang Li, Guosheng Hu
